drl:
rule "R0"
salience -1
agenda-group "gb"
when
    $p0_0 : T1(f3 == false)
then
    insert(new T2("alpha"));
    modify($p0_0) { setF3(true) }
end
rule "R1"
salience 6
when
    $p1_0 : T0()
    accumulate( T2(f0 contains "ab", f0 matches "p+[^b]t*"); $a1_1 : count() )
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    delete($p1_0);
end
rule "R2"
when
    $p2_0 : T0(f2 <= 7, f2 >= 10, $b2_0_0 : f2, $b2_0_1 : f2)
then
    insert(new T2($p2_0.getF0()));
    insert(new T1($p2_0.getF0(), $b2_0_1, $p2_0.getF0(), false));
end
rule "R3"
salience($b3_0_1 - $b3_0_1)
when
    T0(f1 not in (-1000000007, -1000000007, 1.5), $b3_0_0 : f1, $b3_0_1 : f2)
    $p3_1 : T1(f0 < "zz", f2 != "zz", $b3_1_0 : f0, f3 == false)
    exists T0(f1 in (100, 3.5), f2 > -1, f2 > $b3_0_1)
then
    insert(new T2($p3_1.getF2()));
    insert(new T2($b3_1_0));
    modify($p3_1) { setF3(true), setF0($p3_1.getF0()), setF0("ab") }
end
rule "R4"
when
    T0(f0 matches "(a|a)*[b-t]*", f0 < "zz", !(f2 <= -2), $b4_0_0 : f0, $b4_0_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R5"
when
    T0(f2 == -3)
    not(T0(f1 in (3, -1.5, -1.0)) and T1())
then
end
name: fz_9005_2359
